name: RAGatouille (ColBERT)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); no API costs; GPU recommended

performance.notes: ColBERT late interaction ~30ms per query on GPU; higher quality than BM25 or bi-encoder

agent_readiness.notes: Easy-to-use wrapper around ColBERT — a late interaction retrieval model that outperforms bi-encoders for dense retrieval. RAGPretrainedModel.from_pretrained() for plug-and-play. Index documents, search with queries. ColBERT produces token-level embeddings and does late interaction scoring for superior retrieval quality. LlamaIndex integration. Best when embedding-only retrieval quality is insufficient.

gotchas: GPU strongly recommended for indexing large document sets
ColBERT indexes are larger than bi-encoder indexes
Less mature ecosystem than standard vector search
Early stage library — API may change
best_when: High-quality retrieval where standard embedding search is insufficient
Legal, medical, or technical document retrieval requiring precision
When reranking with cross-encoders is too slow but quality matters
avoid_when: Simple use cases where cosine similarity on embeddings suffices
summary: RAGatouille is a Python wrapper around ColBERT — a late interaction retrieval model that outperforms standard bi-encoder embeddings for document retrieval. Simple API for indexing and searching. GPU-accelerated. LlamaIndex integration. Best for high-precision retrieval in legal, medical, or technical domains where standard embedding cosine similarity doesn't meet quality requirements.
